# McDonnell-Price Roofing Contractors Ltd

## Business Summary
McDonnell-Price Roofing Contractors Limited is a family-run roofing and waterproofing specialist based in Hardwicke, Gloucester, with over 60 years of experience in the industry. They serve commercial and domestic clients throughout Gloucestershire and the South West of England.

## Contact Details
- **Phone:** 01453 825 445
- **Email:** enquiries@mcdonnell-price.co.uk
- **Address:** Unit 1, Gabwell Business Centre, Quadrant Way, Hardwicke, Gloucester GL2 2JH

## Services

### Roofing Services
- **Flat Roofing:** Cold liquid applied systems (MARISEAL), single ply membrane (10–20 year guarantees), hot melt systems, bituminous felts, green/living roofs
- **Roof Tiling:** Clay and concrete tiles in all formats and profiles; dry fix ridge, hip, valley and verge systems; ventilation specification
- **Slate Roofing:** Natural slate tested to BS EN 12326, sourced from UK and Spain, installed to BS5534:2003+AL:2010
- **Lead Roofing Work:** Rolled lead sheet flashings, valleys, bay/dormer windows, spires, cornices, parapets, box gutters; full guarantee

### Building Services
- **Building Refurbishment & Maintenance:** Minor building works, bricklaying, plastering, loft insulation, Cotswold dry stone walls, flood wall defence systems
- **Historical Building Restoration:** Grade Listed building restoration; Civic Award winner for restoration of 18 Park Place, Cheltenham (Cheltenham Borough Council)

## Credentials & Accreditations
- NFRC (National Federation of Roofing Contractors) Member
- British Safety Council Member
- CHAS Accredited
- NHBC Safe Mark Scheme
- Construction Line Member
- Exor Member
- Fully compliant CSCS workforce
- Fully insured

## Key Facts
- Over 60 years trading experience
- Approximately 30 skilled employees
- Works throughout South of England
- Major house builder partners: Barratt Homes, David Wilson Homes, Redrow, Crest Nicholson
- Insurance-backed warranties and material guarantees available
- Method Statements and Risk Assessments provided for every contract

## Team

## Geographic Coverage
Gloucestershire, South West England (including Bath area and surrounding counties)
